author: lOrm
content: Fixed: wait thread is now the sole authority for liveness. Removed finished.store(true) from the stdout reader (it now only drains the buffer). Added a new 'reaped' AtomicBool: wait thread sets exit_status FIRST then reaped SECOND under SeqCst. get_output derives is_running from reaped, so observing is_running=false guarantees exit_status was already populated. kill() flips both finished and reaped together. Stress tests: fix674_no_finished_without_exit_code spams 30 fast processes (mix of 'true' / 'echo') and a dedicated poller thread runs 200 polls/shell looking for (is_running=false, exit_code=None). fix674_settled_finished_has_exit_code spawns 20 'exit N' commands, waits 600ms, asserts every settled shell reports Some(expected_code).
